tetraMobileDescription: Stake ORBS more easily on mobile with the native TETRA app. Open the store link or scan a QR code to install it on iOS or Android.
walletLoginDescription: Connect once and use your wallet across apps without creating a new account.
walletLoginTitle: A new way to log in
walletOwnAssetsDescription: Wallets are used to send, receive, store, and display digital assets such as ORBS and ETH.
walletOwnAssetsTitle: Your digital assets in one place
walletGuideEmptyDescription: Select a wallet from the left to start using another wallet provider.
walletGuideEmptyTitle: Not finding what you are looking for?
